seo.title: Appliance Champion | Expert Appliance Repair in Addison, TX
seo.description: Trusted appliance repair in Addison, TX. Fast, reliable service for refrigerators, ovens, washers, dryers, and dishwashers. Same-day appointments available. Call (972) 908-0300.

hero.headline: Fast, Reliable Appliance Repair in Addison
hero.subheadline: Expert technicians, same-day service, and upfront pricing — we fix your appliances right the first time.

featureSections.title: We Get Your Appliances Running Like New
featureSections.body: From refrigerators to dishwashers, our certified technicians handle all major brands and models. We use genuine parts and offer a warranty on every repair.
bullets: All repairs backed by a 90-day warranty
featureSections.cardBody: Book online or call us. We'll arrive on time and fix it fast.

featureSections.title: Quality Repairs You Can Count On
featureSections.body: We don't cut corners. Every repair is done with precision and care, using OEM or equivalent parts to ensure long-lasting results.
featureSections.cardBody: If you're not happy, we'll make it right. That's our promise.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team has over a decade of combined experience repairing all major appliance brands.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll know the cost upfront before any work begins — no hidden fees or surprise charges.

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs can be scheduled the same day. We'll have your appliance back in action fast.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on All Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: Every repair comes with a 90-day parts and labor warranty for your peace of mind.

servicesPage.intro: We provide expert repair services for all major home appliances in Addison, TX. Our certified technicians use quality parts and offer a satisfaction guarantee on every job.

services.title: Refrigerator Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast fixes for fridges, freezers, and ice makers.
services.longDescription: Is your refrigerator not cooling? Ice maker jammed? Our technicians diagnose and repair all refrigerator issues quickly. We work on all brands including Samsung, LG, Whirlpool, and GE.
benefits: Restore proper cooling and temperature control
Fix ice makers, water dispensers, and door seals
Extend the life of your appliance

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect your fridge and identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Using genuine parts, we fix the issue efficiently.

process.title: Test
process.description: We test to ensure everything works perfectly.

faqs.question: How long does a refrigerator repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Do you repair ice makers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair all types of ice makers and water dispensers.

services.title: Oven & Stove Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable oven, stove, and cooktop repairs.
services.longDescription: From gas burners not lighting to electric ovens not heating, we handle all oven and stove problems. Our technicians are trained to repair all major brands.
benefits: Get your oven heating evenly again
Fix broken knobs, igniters, and heating elements
Ensure safe operation of gas and electric ranges

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check the power source, igniters, and heating elements.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We replace faulty parts with high-quality components.

process.title: Safety Check
process.description: We test for proper operation and safety.

faqs.question: Can you repair both gas and electric ovens?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service both gas and electric ovens, stoves, and cooktops.

faqs.question: Do you replace oven heating elements?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stock common elements and can order rare ones.

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert washer and dryer repair services.
services.longDescription: Is your washer not spinning? Dryer not heating? We fix all makes and models, including front-load and top-load washers, and gas or electric dryers.
benefits: Fix leaks, noises, and error codes

process.title: Diagnostic
process.description: We run a diagnostic cycle to pinpoint the issue.

process.title: Part Replacement
process.description: We replace belts, motors, pumps, or thermostats as needed.

process.title: Final Test
process.description: We run a full cycle to confirm the repair.

faqs.question: How much does a washer repair cost?
faqs.answer: Cost varies, but we provide a flat-rate quote before starting any work.

faqs.question: Do you repair dryers that won't heat?
faqs.answer: Yes, we diagnose and repair heating issues in both gas and electric dryers.

services.title: Dishwasher Repair
services.shortDescription: Get your dishwasher cleaning dishes perfectly again.
services.longDescription: Dishwasher not draining, leaving dishes dirty, or making strange noises? Our technicians can handle any dishwasher problem, from clogged spray arms to faulty control boards.
benefits: Extend the life of your dishwasher

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check the spray arms, pump, and drain hose.

process.title: Clean & Repair
process.description: We remove clogs and replace worn parts.

process.title: Performance Test
process.description: We run a cycle to ensure everything works.

faqs.question: How long does a dishwasher repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Do you fix dishwashers that are leaking?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can identify and fix the source of the leak.

about.headline: Your Trusted Appliance Repair Experts in Addison
about.mission: Our mission is to provide fast, reliable, and affordable appliance repair to every Addison homeowner and business.
story: Appliance Champion was founded with a simple goal: to offer appliance repair that's honest, transparent, and high-quality. Our founder, a veteran technician, saw too many customers overcharged for shoddy work. So we built a company that puts the customer first — with upfront pricing, same-day service, and a real warranty.

Today, we serve the entire Addison area from our Dooley Road location. Our team of certified technicians has repaired thousands of appliances, from refrigerators to dishwashers. We're proud to be a local business that neighbors trust.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what's wrong and what it costs before we start.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use the best parts and stand behind our work with a warranty.

coreValues.title: Speed
coreValues.description: We know a broken appliance is a hassle. We aim for same-day service whenever possible.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with the utmost respect.
